allow: Bash(node -e "const { resolvePlayerKey } = require\(''./backend/services/playerService''\); console.log\(''Resolve djokovic:'', resolvePlayerKey\(''djokovic''\)\); console.log\(''Resolve sinner:'', resolvePlayerKey\(''sinner''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { resolvePlayerKey } = require\(''./backend/services/playerService''\); const tests = [''djokovic'', ''sinner'', ''alcaraz'', ''medvedev'', ''novak djokovic'', ''jannik sinner'']; tests.forEach\(t => console.log\(t, ''→'', resolvePlayerKey\(t\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const keys = [''Anna Blinkova'', ''Carlos Alcaraz'', ''Iga Swiatek'', ''Jannik Sinner'', ''Novak Djokovic'', ''Daniil Medvedev'']; const tests = [''djokovic'', ''medvedev'', ''sinner'', ''alcaraz'']; tests.forEach\(t => { const m = keys.find\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(t\)\); console.log\(t, ''→ includes →'', m\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const { getPlayerProfile } = require\(''./backend/services/playerService''\); getPlayerProfile\(''Novak Djokovic''\).then\(p => console.log\(''Got:'', p ? p.overview.name : ''null''\)\).catch\(e => console.log\(''Error:'', e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const keys = [''Anna Blinkova'', ''Carlos Alcaraz'', ''Iga Swiatek'', ''Jannik Sinner'', ''Novak Djokovic'', ''Daniil Medvedev'']; const t = ''djokovic''; const m = keys.find\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(t\)\); console.log\(''includes check:'', t, ''in'', m\);")

Bash(node -e "const { PROFILE_DB } = require\(''./backend/data/db''\); const keys = Object.keys\(PROFILE_DB\); const t = ''djokovic''; const r = keys.find\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(t\)\); console.log\(''keys:'', keys\); console.log\(''find djokovic:'', r\);")

Bash(node -e "const { predictMatch } = require\(''./backend/services/aiPredictorService''\); const { initStore } = require\(''./backend/history/historicalStore''\); \(async \(\) => { await initStore\(\); const r = await predictMatch\(''Novak Djokovic'', ''Carlos Alcaraz'', ''hard''\); console.log\(''edges:'', r.edges\); }\)\(\).catch\(console.error\);")
